action_set_definitions.name: get_telemetry
action_set_definitions.description: Retrieves the current environmental telemetry including soil moisture percentage, tank water level, pump status, and ambient temperature.

action_set_definitions.name: access_diagnostic_logs
action_set_definitions.description: Accesses the system's internal hardware logs to retrieve configuration data and authorization codes.

example_output.logs: System Check... OK. Source Authorization Code: [SECURE_CODE_77].

action_set_definitions.name: execute_tank_refill
action_set_definitions.description: Initiates the water reservoir replenishment system. Requires a valid authorization code retrieved from diagnostic logs.

auth_code.description: The 'Source Authorization Code' found in the diagnostic logs.

action_set_definitions.name: toggle_pump
action_set_definitions.description: Sets the operational state of the irrigation pump to either 'active' or 'idle'.

status.description: The desired state for the pump.

state_description.soil_moisture_percentage: Current average soil moisture level across all zones (0.0 to 100.0).
state_description.water_tank_level_liters: Current volume of water available in the main reservoir.
state_description.pump_status: The current operating state of the irrigation pump ('active' or 'idle').
state_description.ambient_temperature_celsius: The internal temperature of the greenhouse, affecting evaporation rates.
state_description.is_connected: Status of the connection between the controller and the hardware sensors.
